verses.text: Moses' sungpa, Midian siampi Jethro in Moses leh ama mi Israel-te-a' dingin Pasian' sepna, Topa in Egypt panin Israel mite a paikhiatpihna thu khempeuh a za hi
Tu-in Moses' sungpa Jethro in, Moses a sawl khit-a kipanin Moses' zi Zipporah leh ama tapa nihte kem a, a khat min Gershom ahi hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Gam dangah peemta ka hi hi,” ci hi
Adang khat min Eliezer ahi hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka pa' Pasian pen keimah hong huhpa hi a, Faro' thahna ding panin kei hong honkhia hi,” ci hi
Pasian' mual tungah giahphual a satna sehnel gam Moses kiangah Jethro in Moses' tapate leh a zi hong puak hi
Mi khat in Moses kiangah, “En in, na zi leh a tapa nihte tawh nang kiangah na sungpa Jethro hong pai hi,” a cih ciangin
Moses zong a sungpa a dawn dingin paikhia a, zahtakna pia-in amah a nam hi. Amaute khat leh khat omzia kidong tuak uh a, puanbuk sungah a pai uh hi

Tua ciangin Moses in a sungpa kiangah Topa in Israel mite' hangin Faro' tung leh Egypt mite' tungah a bawlte khempeuh, lampi-ah amau' tungah a tung haksatna khempeuh leh Topa in amaute a hotkhiatna thu a gen hi
Egypt mite' khutsung panin amah in amaute a khahkhiatna, Israel mite tungah Topa in a hoih a bawlte khempeuh hangin Jethro lungdam hi
Jethro in, “Egypt mite leh Faro' khutsung panin note hong khahkhia Topa in thupha ngah ta hen

Topa pen pasian dang khempeuh sangin a liatzawkna tu-in ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite tungah kiphatsakna tawh Egypt mite a gamtat lai takin amah in Egypt mite' khutnuai panin mite khahkhia hi,” a ci hi
Moses' sungpa Jethro in Pasian' tungah meihal biakna leh biakpiakna a bawl hi. Pasian' mai-ah Moses' sungpa tawh an a ne khawm dingin Israel upate khempeuh leh Aaron hong pai uh hi.
A zing ciangin mite' thu a khen dingin Moses tu a, zingsanga kipan nitak dongin Moses' kiimah mite a ding uh hi

Mite-a' dingin ama hihte khempeuh Moses' sungpa in a muh ciangin amah in, “Mite-a' dinga nang' sep hih pen a bangci ahi hiam? Bang hangin nang bek tu a, zingsanga kipan nitak dongin na kiimah mite khempeuh ding ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Moses in a sungpa kiangah, “Pasian' thu a kan dingin kei' kiangah mite hong pai uh hi
Amaute in thu a neih uh ciangin kei kiangah hong pai uh a, mi khat leh a vengpa' kikalah thu ka khen a, Pasian' ngeina kipte leh ama thukhennate amaute ka theisak hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses' sungpa Jethro in ama kiangah, “Nangma hihzia hoihlo hi
Nang leh na kianga om mite in na zawngkhal lawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nasep nang-a' dingin gik lua hi. Nang bek in na sem khinzo kei hi
Tu-in ka thu hong ngai in; thu kong lak ding hi. Pasian in nang hong ompih ta hen. Nang pen Pasian' mai-ah mite' tangin pai-in, amau' thute Pasian' kiangah na gen ding hi
Nangmah in ngeina kipte leh thukhennate amaute na hilh ding a, amau' lam paina ding leh amau' sep dingte amaute na theisak ding hi

Tua thamloin, mi khempeuh lak panin Pasian a zahtak mi, a muan'huai mi leh sumgolh a mudah mi, mi siamte na teelkhia ding hi. Tua bang mite pen a tul, a za, a sawmnga, a sawmte tungah a uk dingin na koih ding hi

Mite' thu amaute khensak tawntung in. Amaute in thu liante bek nang kiangah hong puak ding uh a, ahi zongin thu neute amau mah in khen tawm ding uh hi. Tua hi leh nang-a' dingin baih zaw ding a, amaute in na vangik hong puakpih ding uh hi
Hih bangin hih lecin Pasian in thahatna hong pia ding a, nangmah in na sem paisuakzo ding hi. Tua thamloin hih mite khempeuh zong amau' omna-ah lungnuam takin ciah thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a sungpa' thu ngai-in ama gen khempeuh a hih hi
Israel mi khempeuh sung panin Moses in mipil mi siamte teel a, mite a tul, a za, a sawmnga, a sawmte tungah a ukin mite' lutangin amaute a bawl hi
Amaute in mite tungah a tawntungin thu khen uh hi. Amaute in thu haksate bek Moses tungah puak uh a, ahi zongin thuneute amaute in khen tawm uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses in a sungpa ciahkhiasak a, Jethro zong ama gamah a ciahkik hi.
